EventType.label: Spam classifier model not found
EventType.explanation: No trained spam classifier model exists yet; the classifier will be unavailable until sufficient training samples are provided.

EventType.name: spam.rules-updated
EventType.label: Spam filter rules updated
EventType.explanation: The spam filter ruleset was reloaded after a configuration or remote update.

EventType.name: spf.pass
EventType.label: SPF check passed
EventType.explanation: The sending server's IP is explicitly authorized to send mail for the domain in the SPF record.

EventType.name: spf.fail
EventType.label: SPF check failed
EventType.explanation: The sending server's IP is explicitly not authorized; the message should be rejected or marked per DMARC policy.

EventType.name: spf.soft-fail
EventType.label: SPF soft fail
EventType.explanation: The sending server's IP is not authorized but the domain owner prefers the message be accepted with a warning rather than rejected.

EventType.name: spf.neutral
EventType.label: SPF neutral result
EventType.explanation: The domain's SPF record makes no assertion about the sending IP; the result is treated as if no record exists.

EventType.name: spf.temp-error
EventType.label: SPF temporary error
EventType.explanation: A transient DNS error prevented the SPF check from completing; the result is treated as neutral for this message.

EventType.name: spf.perm-error
EventType.label: SPF permanent error
EventType.explanation: The SPF record is syntactically invalid or caused a lookup limit to be exceeded; the check result is indeterminate.

EventType.name: spf.none
EventType.label: No SPF record
EventType.explanation: No SPF record was published for the sending domain; the check result is none and no authorization decision can be made.

EventType.name: store.assert-value-failed
EventType.label: Another process modified the record
EventType.explanation: An optimistic locking conflict was detected; another process updated the same record concurrently and the operation must be retried.

EventType.name: store.foundationdb-error
EventType.label: FoundationDB error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the FoundationDB backend; check FoundationDB cluster health and connectivity.

EventType.name: store.mysql-error
EventType.label: MySQL error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the MySQL backend; check database connectivity, credentials, and query logs.

EventType.name: store.postgresql-error
EventType.label: PostgreSQL error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the PostgreSQL backend; check database connectivity, credentials, and query logs.

EventType.name: store.rocksdb-error
EventType.label: RocksDB error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the RocksDB embedded store; this may indicate disk issues or a corrupted database file.

EventType.name: store.sqlite-error
EventType.label: SQLite error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the SQLite backend; this may indicate a locked, corrupted, or missing database file.

EventType.name: store.ldap-error
EventType.label: LDAP error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the LDAP directory server; check connectivity, bind credentials, and server logs.

EventType.name: store.elasticsearch-error
EventType.label: ElasticSearch error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the Elasticsearch backend; check cluster health, index availability, and connectivity.

EventType.name: store.meilisearch-error
EventType.label: Meilisearch error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the Meilisearch backend; check service availability and index configuration.

EventType.name: store.redis-error
EventType.label: Redis error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the Redis backend; check connectivity and Redis server health.

EventType.name: store.s3-error
EventType.label: S3 error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the S3-compatible blob store; check bucket permissions, credentials, and endpoint configuration.

EventType.name: store.azure-error
EventType.label: Azure error
EventType.explanation: An error was returned by the Azure Blob Storage backend; check container permissions and connection string.

EventType.name: store.filesystem-error
EventType.label: Filesystem error
EventType.explanation: A filesystem operation failed; check disk space, file permissions, and the configured storage path.

EventType.name: store.pool-error
EventType.label: Connection pool error
EventType.explanation: A database connection pool error occurred; the pool may be exhausted or the backend may be unreachable.

EventType.name: store.data-corruption
EventType.label: Data corruption detected
EventType.explanation: A stored value failed integrity checks; the record may be unreadable and manual recovery may be required.

EventType.name: store.decompress-error
EventType.label: Decompression error
EventType.explanation: A stored blob or record could not be decompressed; the data may be corrupt.

EventType.name: store.deserialize-error
EventType.label: Deserialization error
EventType.explanation: A stored record could not be deserialized; it may have been written by an incompatible version of the server.

EventType.name: store.not-found
EventType.label: Record not found in database
EventType.explanation: A lookup for a specific record returned no result; the caller will handle this as an expected miss.

EventType.name: store.not-configured
EventType.label: Store not configured
EventType.explanation: An operation was attempted on a store backend that has not been configured; check the server configuration.

EventType.name: store.not-supported
EventType.label: Operation not supported by store
EventType.explanation: The requested operation is not supported by the currently configured store backend.

EventType.name: store.unexpected-error
EventType.label: Unexpected store error
EventType.explanation: An unclassified internal error occurred in the store layer; consult the server logs for details.

EventType.name: store.crypto-error
EventType.label: Store crypto error
EventType.explanation: An encryption or decryption operation on stored data failed; check key configuration and data integrity.

EventType.name: store.http-store-error
EventType.label: Error updating HTTP store
EventType.explanation: A download of an HTTP lookup list (e.g. a blocklist or allowlist) failed; the list will not be updated until the next retry.

EventType.name: store.cache-miss
EventType.label: Cache miss
EventType.explanation: No cached account data was found; the data will be loaded from the database and cached for subsequent requests.

EventType.name: store.cache-hit
EventType.label: Cache hit
EventType.explanation: Valid cached account data was found; the database lookup is skipped for this request.

EventType.name: store.cache-stale
EventType.label: Cache is stale
EventType.explanation: The cached account data has expired or been invalidated; it is being rebuilt from the database.

EventType.name: store.cache-update
EventType.label: Cache update
EventType.explanation: The account data cache was refreshed with the latest changes from the database.

EventType.name: store.blob-missing-marker
EventType.label: Blob missing marker
EventType.explanation: A blob in storage is missing its expected format marker; the blob may be corrupt or from an incompatible version.

EventType.name: store.data-write
EventType.label: Write batch operation
EventType.explanation: A batched write transaction was committed to the data store; logged at trace level for storage debugging.

EventType.name: store.data-iterate
EventType.label: Data store iteration operation
EventType.explanation: A range scan or iteration over the data store was performed; logged at trace level for storage debugging.

EventType.name: store.blob-read
EventType.label: Blob read operation
EventType.explanation: A blob was read from the blob store; logged at trace level for storage debugging.

EventType.name: store.blob-write
EventType.label: Blob write operation
EventType.explanation: A blob was written to the blob store; logged at trace level for storage debugging.

EventType.name: store.blob-delete
EventType.label: Blob delete operation
EventType.explanation: A blob was deleted from the blob store; logged at trace level for storage debugging.

EventType.name: store.sql-query
EventType.label: SQL query executed
EventType.explanation: A SQL query was executed against the configured relational database backend; logged at trace level for query debugging.

EventType.name: store.ldap-query
EventType.label: LDAP query executed
EventType.explanation: An LDAP query was executed against the configured directory server; logged at trace level for query debugging.

EventType.name: store.ldap-warning
EventType.label: LDAP authentication warning
EventType.explanation: An LDAP directory operation returned a warning response; authentication may have partially succeeded.

EventType.name: store.http-store-fetch
EventType.label: HTTP store updated
EventType.explanation: An HTTP lookup list was successfully downloaded and the in-memory store has been updated with its contents.

EventType.name: store.auto-expunge
EventType.label: Auto-expunge executed
EventType.explanation: Scheduled cleanup ran and deleted expired messages from Trash and Junk folders per the configured retention policy.

EventType.name: store.blob-store-purged
EventType.label: Blob store purge completed
EventType.explanation: The scheduled blob store purge finished, removing orphaned or expired blobs to reclaim storage space.

EventType.name: store.data-store-purged
EventType.label: Data store purge completed
EventType.explanation: The scheduled data store purge finished, removing expired records and compacting the database.

EventType.name: task-manager.task-acquired
EventType.label: Task acquired from queue
EventType.explanation: A background task was dequeued and assigned to this node for execution.

EventType.name: task-manager.task-queued
EventType.label: Task queued for processing
EventType.explanation: A new background task has been placed into the task queue and is waiting for a worker to pick it up.

EventType.name: task-manager.task-scheduled
EventType.label: Task scheduled for future execution
EventType.explanation: A background task has been scheduled to run at a future time, such as a deferred report or maintenance job.

EventType.name: task-manager.task-locked
EventType.label: Task is locked by another process
EventType.explanation: Another cluster node has already acquired this task; this node will skip it to avoid duplicate execution.

EventType.name: task-manager.task-ignored
EventType.label: Task ignored based on current server roles
EventType.explanation: This task type is not assigned to the current node's cluster role; the task is skipped without processing.

EventType.name: task-manager.task-failed
EventType.label: Task failed during processing
EventType.explanation: A background task encountered an error during execution; it may be retried depending on the retry policy.

EventType.name: task-manager.task-retry
EventType.label: Task will be retried
EventType.explanation: A background task failed but is eligible for retry; it has been rescheduled according to the retry strategy.

EventType.name: task-manager.blob-not-found
EventType.label: Blob not found for task
EventType.explanation: A blob required for task execution was not found in the blob store; the task cannot proceed.

EventType.name: task-manager.metadata-not-found
EventType.label: Metadata not found for task
EventType.explanation: Metadata required for task execution was not found in the store; the task cannot proceed.

EventType.name: task-manager.scheduler-started
EventType.label: Task scheduler started
EventType.explanation: The task scheduler subsystem has started and is now triggering scheduled background tasks.

EventType.name: task-manager.manager-started
EventType.label: Task manager started
EventType.explanation: The task manager subsystem has started and is now processing background task queues.

EventType.name: telemetry.alert-event
EventType.label: Alert event triggered
EventType.explanation: A configured metric alert threshold was crossed; an alert notification will be sent to the configured recipients.

EventType.name: telemetry.alert-message
EventType.label: Alert message sent
EventType.explanation: An alert notification email was dispatched to the configured recipients for a triggered metric alert.

EventType.name: telemetry.log-error
EventType.label: Log collector error
EventType.explanation: The log collector encountered an error writing to the configured log target; log entries may be lost.

EventType.name: telemetry.webhook-error
EventType.label: Webhook collector error
EventType.explanation: An event could not be delivered to the configured webhook endpoint; the event may be dropped or retried.

EventType.name: telemetry.otel-exporter-error
EventType.label: OpenTelemetry exporter error
EventType.explanation: An error occurred while exporting traces or spans to the configured OpenTelemetry collector endpoint.

EventType.name: telemetry.otel-metrics-exporter-error
EventType.label: OpenTelemetry metrics exporter error
EventType.explanation: An error occurred while exporting metrics to the configured OpenTelemetry metrics endpoint.

EventType.name: telemetry.prometheus-exporter-error
EventType.label: Prometheus exporter error
EventType.explanation: An error occurred while serving or pushing metrics to the Prometheus scrape endpoint.

EventType.name: telemetry.journal-error
EventType.label: Journal collector error
EventType.explanation: An error occurred while writing events to the system journal (e.g. journald); log entries may be lost.

EventType.name: telemetry.metrics-collected
EventType.label: Metrics collected
EventType.explanation: A metrics collection cycle completed; counters and histograms have been sampled and are ready for export.

EventType.name: telemetry.metrics-stored
EventType.label: Metric store
EventType.explanation: Collected metrics were persisted to the internal metrics store for historical querying.

EventType.name: telemetry.metrics-pushed
EventType.label: Metrics pushed
EventType.explanation: A batch of metrics was successfully pushed to all configured telemetry exporters.

EventType.name: tls.handshake
EventType.label: TLS handshake
EventType.explanation: A TLS handshake with a client or server completed successfully; the connection is now encrypted.

EventType.name: tls.handshake-error
EventType.label: TLS handshake error
EventType.explanation: A TLS handshake failed; the client may not support the configured TLS version or cipher, or presented an invalid certificate.

EventType.name: tls.not-configured
EventType.label: TLS not configured
EventType.explanation: A TLS connection was requested but no certificate is configured for this listener; the connection cannot be established.

EventType.name: tls.certificate-not-found
EventType.label: TLS certificate not found
EventType.explanation: No certificate matching the client's SNI hostname was found; the default certificate will be used if one is configured.

EventType.name: tls.no-certificates-available
EventType.label: No TLS certificates available
EventType.explanation: No valid TLS certificates are available for this listener; TLS connections will fail until a certificate is provisioned.

EventType.name: tls.multiple-certificates-available
EventType.label: Multiple TLS certificates available
EventType.explanation: More than one certificate matches the requested SNI hostname; the first matching certificate will be used.

EventType.name: tls.expired-certificate-removed
EventType.label: Certificate expired and removed
EventType.explanation: An expired TLS certificate was automatically removed from the active certificate store during a cleanup cycle.

EventType.name: tls-rpt.record-fetch
EventType.label: Fetched TLS-RPT record
EventType.explanation: The TLS-RPT DNS record for the recipient domain was fetched to determine where TLS failure reports should be sent.

EventType.name: tls-rpt.record-fetch-error
EventType.label: Error fetching TLS-RPT record
EventType.explanation: A DNS error occurred while fetching the TLS-RPT record; TLS failure reports cannot be sent for this domain.

EventType.name: tls-rpt.record-not-found
EventType.label: TLS-RPT record not found
EventType.explanation: No TLS-RPT record was found for the domain; the domain has not opted into TLS failure reporting.

EventType.name: web-dav.propfind
EventType.label: WebDAV PROPFIND request
EventType.explanation: A client requested property metadata for a resource or collection (used by CalDAV/CardDAV for calendar and contact discovery).

EventType.name: web-dav.proppatch
EventType.label: WebDAV PROPPATCH request
EventType.explanation: A client updated property metadata on a resource or collection.

EventType.name: web-dav.get
EventType.label: WebDAV GET request
EventType.explanation: A client downloaded a resource such as a calendar event, contact, or file.

EventType.name: web-dav.head
EventType.label: WebDAV HEAD request
EventType.explanation: A client requested headers only for a resource, typically to check existence or modification time without downloading the body.

EventType.name: web-dav.report
EventType.label: WebDAV REPORT request
EventType.explanation: A client issued a REPORT query, used by CalDAV/CardDAV for calendar queries, free-busy lookups, and sync operations.

EventType.name: web-dav.mkcol
EventType.label: WebDAV MKCOL request
EventType.explanation: A client created a new collection (folder) on the server.

EventType.name: web-dav.mkcalendar
EventType.label: WebDAV MKCALENDAR request
EventType.explanation: A CalDAV client created a new calendar collection.

EventType.name: web-dav.delete
EventType.label: WebDAV DELETE request
EventType.explanation: A client deleted a resource or collection from the server.

EventType.name: web-dav.put
EventType.label: WebDAV PUT request
EventType.explanation: A client uploaded or updated a resource such as a calendar event or contact card.

EventType.name: web-dav.post
EventType.label: WebDAV POST request
EventType.explanation: A client submitted data via POST, typically used for CalDAV scheduling or free-busy queries.

EventType.name: web-dav.patch
EventType.label: WebDAV PATCH request
EventType.explanation: A client applied a partial update to a resource.

EventType.name: web-dav.copy
EventType.label: WebDAV COPY request
EventType.explanation: A client copied a resource or collection to another location on the server.

EventType.name: web-dav.move
EventType.label: WebDAV MOVE request
EventType.explanation: A client moved or renamed a resource or collection on the server.

EventType.name: web-dav.lock
EventType.label: WebDAV LOCK request
EventType.explanation: A client acquired a write lock on a resource to prevent concurrent modifications.

EventType.name: web-dav.unlock
EventType.label: WebDAV UNLOCK request
EventType.explanation: A client released a previously acquired write lock on a resource.

EventType.name: web-dav.acl
EventType.label: WebDAV ACL request
EventType.explanation: A client modified the access control list for a resource or collection.

EventType.name: web-dav.options
EventType.label: WebDAV OPTIONS request
EventType.explanation: A client requested the supported HTTP methods and WebDAV features for a resource, typically during capability discovery.

EventType.name: web-dav.error
EventType.label: WebDAV error
EventType.explanation: An error occurred while processing a WebDAV request; check the associated status code and resource path.
